rationale: The proposed change concerns the homestead exemption amount under Tax Code §11.13(b). Elec. Code §253.041 governs restrictions on political contribution payments by candidates and officeholders. The two provisions address unrelated subjects.
quote: A candidate or officeholder or a specific-purpose committee for supporting, opposing, or assisting the candidate or officeholder may not knowingly make or authorize a payment from a political contribution
_note: No overlap between proposed homestead exemption change and election code payment restrictions.
